data.title: The Dot Corp in Irvine, Calif expands its services with a new Promotional Products & Apparel division, offering clients a single partner for various services.
data.description: A company based in Irvine, California, announced on December 5, 2025, has broadened its offerings by introducing a new division dedicated to Promotional Products & Apparel. This expansion provides customers with a comprehensive solution for print, mail, fulfillment, branded merchandise, and corporate gifting. The newly launched division will include a range of apparel and promotional items to cater to client needs.

data.title: Brian Wynne will chair American Heart Association's 2026 First Coast Heart Ball in Jacksonville, Florida, focusing on advocacy and care for military families. CEO of Acosta Group.
data.description: Brian Wynne, the president and CEO of Acosta Group, will be the chairman for the 2026 First Coast Heart Ball in Jacksonville, Florida. The event is focused on advocating for, providing access to, and delivering care for military families. The announcement was made on December 5, 2025. Acosta Group is a prominent sales and marketing agency collective. This year the Heart Ball aims to raise a record-breaking amount in donations, with a target of at least 1.5 million dollars, to support families in need.

data.title: HexClad and Still G.I.N. team up for celeb-packed cocktail shaker release, featuring Gordon Ramsay, Dr. Dre, and Snoop Dogg.
data.description: HexClad and Still G.I.N. have recently announced their first-ever collaboration that has brought together renowned personalities such as Gordon Ramsay, Dr. Dre, and Snoop Dogg for the creation of a cutting-edge cocktail shaker. This unexpected partnership was revealed in Los Angeles on December 5, 2025. HexClad, known for its innovative cookware, teamed up with Still G.I.N. to introduce this unique product that is set to make a mark in the industry. The collaboration has generated significant buzz and is anticipated to be well-received by consumers and fans of the celebrities involved.

data.title: Cue Chef Innovation debuts Cube O1, a palm-sized thermal-AI cooking assistant for consistent results.
data.description: In San Francisco on December 5, 2025, a cutting-edge palm-sized gadget was introduced that observes your cooking method, adapts to your preferences, and helps you achieve consistent outcomes without the need for screens or voice commands. This innovative tool marks the commencement of a new era in intuitive cooking. Gone are the days of stressing over the culinary process; with just beeps and light, this device simplifies the cooking experience for users.

data.title: Vaniam Group introduces Predictive Pathways to aid anticipating market shifts. Expands Vaniam Intelligence.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Chicago, the Vaniam Group™ revealed the expansion of Vaniam Intelligence™ by introducing Predictive Pathways. This addition aims to assist biopharma teams in forecasting market trends as they redefine medical communications.

data.title: Investors of Stride urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if suffered losses between Oct 22, 2024 and Oct 28, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Stride to reach out to him directly to explore potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Stride from October 22, 2024, to October 28, 2025, and are interested in discussing...

data.title: MILA Miami, under Riviera Dining Group, is now the top-grossing independent restaurant in America, cementing status as Miami icon.
data.description: A highly sought-after ranking has solidified Riviera Dining Group's signature concept as a prominent Miami Beach icon. Based in Miami Beach, Fla., on December 5, 2025, the esteemed founders of Riviera Dining Group proudly revealed that their flagship establishment, MILA, has become a symbol of excellence.

data.title: Salesforce reports record-breaking $336.6B global spend during Cyber Week with $79.6B in US sales, 7% YOY increase.
data.description: In San Francisco, Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) revealed its findings from the 2025 Cyber Week (November 25-December 1), examining data from more than 1.5 billion shoppers. The global sales during this period surged by 7% year over year (YOY) to reach $336.6 billion, with the U.S. market contributing $79.6 billion, marking a 5% YOY increase. These numbers indicate robust consumer interest in holiday shopping, despite a challenging economic environment.

data.title: ICEYE partners with General Catalyst to improve space-based intelligence in Europe with new financing, led by General Catalyst.
data.description: A company based in Helsinki, Finland, ICEYE, known for their synthetic aperture radar (SAR) satellite systems, announced on December 5, 2025, that they have obtained new funding. General Catalyst is leading the financing round, with significant participation from various European investors. The funds will support ICEYE in speeding up the distribution of their sovereign technology.

data.title: Michael Baker International appoints Steven Stuart as Great Lakes Regional Technical Manager for Traffic Engineering, bringing expertise to transportation projects in the region.
data.description: Michael Baker International, a prominent engineering and consulting firm, has announced the appointment of Mr. Stuart to provide strong technical leadership and strategic guidance for transportation projects in the Great Lakes Region. The company made this announcement on December 5, 2025, in Pittsburgh. Mr. Stuart's extensive subject matter expertise will be instrumental in overseeing complex projects in the region. This move is set to enhance the company's capabilities and ensure successful project execution in the area.

data.title: Commodity plastics market to hit $650B by 2033 with 5.0% CAGR, driven by diverse industries & material innovation.
data.description: The rising demand for commodity plastics across various sectors such as packaging, automotive, construction, and consumer goods is propelling the market. Its growth is attributed to the material's versatility, durability, lightweight characteristics, and cost-efficiency. Innovations in recyclable forms and sustainable production processes are also driving the market forward. The commodity plastics market is experiencing significant growth, with a projected market value of $580 billion by 2025, indicating a compound annual growth rate of 5.8% from the current market value of $420 billion. This positive trajectory is expected to continue due to the increasing adoption of these plastics in different industries globally.

data.title: Organic Dried Fruit Market set to reach $5.78 billion by 2033 with 6.5% CAGR growth. Demand rises due to health-conscious consumers and sustainable food preferences.
data.description: The market for organic dried fruit is experiencing significant growth, fueled by increasing consumer interest in natural, nutritious snacks and sustainable food options. Factors driving this expansion include a rising awareness of health benefits, a shift towards plant-based diets, and higher levels of disposable income among consumers. This has resulted in a surge in demand for organic dried fruit products, with sales reaching impressive figures and showing no signs of slowing down.
Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Synovus Bank

data.title: Ashkenazy Acquisition Corp buys 600,000 sq ft Chicago power center for $60 million as part of a $750 million strategy.
data.description: In a recent deal, Ashkenazy Acquisition Corp., a private real estate investment firm led by Ben Ashkenazy, has acquired Orland Park Place, a prominent regional power center located in a densely populated suburb of Chicago. The purchase amount for this acquisition stands at $60 million. This investment is in line with the company's ongoing plan to allocate a total of $750 million towards procuring top-tier retail, hospitality assets, and distressed debt across various regions in the United States.

data.title: Aptera Co-CEO Chris Anthony to speak at A.G.P.'s Electric Vehicles Conference; company's innovation highlighted.
data.description: Today, Aptera disclosed that Co-CEO Chris Anthony is set to take part in A.G.P.'s Annual Virtual Electric Vehicles and Transportation Conference.
